caption: A man with white hair and glasses, wearing a black collared shirt, sits at a desk in a studio setting. Behind him are multiple screens displaying financial data, including green and red tables of numbers and a white line graph against a black background. The text "S&P 500" and "tiger-IV" are visible on the screens. The man is speaking and gesturing with his hands, moving them from his chest area outward as the sequence progresses. He maintains a focused expression while looking slightly off-camera. The studio features a dark blue background with subtle geometric patterns and a modern desk with reflective surfaces and red accent lighting underneath. In the final moments, the white text "In this" appears centered on the screen across the man's chest. The lighting remains consistent across the scene, focusing on the man and the illuminated financial displays.
